description: SpreadSheet formula definitions — each formula is isolated so one failure cannot affect others.

formulas.name: SUM
formulas.description: Returns the sum of all numbers in a range or list.

formulas.name: AVERAGE
formulas.description: Returns the arithmetic mean of the arguments.

formulas.name: MIN
formulas.description: Returns the smallest value in a set of values.

formulas.name: MAX
formulas.description: Returns the largest value in a set of values.

formulas.name: COUNT
formulas.description: Counts how many numbers are in the list of arguments.

formulas.name: COUNTA
formulas.description: Counts how many values are in the list (non-empty).

formulas.name: COUNTBLANK
formulas.description: Counts the number of empty cells in a range.

formulas.name: PRODUCT
formulas.description: Multiplies all the numbers given as arguments.

formulas.name: POWER
formulas.description: Returns the result of a number raised to a power.

formulas.name: SQRT
formulas.description: Returns the positive square root of a number.

formulas.name: ABS
formulas.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

formulas.name: ROUND
formulas.description: Rounds a number to a specified number of digits.

formulas.name: ROUNDUP
formulas.description: Rounds a number up, away from zero.

formulas.name: ROUNDDOWN
formulas.description: Rounds a number down, toward zero.

formulas.name: FLOOR
formulas.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple of significance.

formulas.name: CEILING
formulas.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest multiple of significance.

formulas.name: INT
formulas.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

formulas.name: MOD
formulas.description: Returns the remainder after number is divided by divisor.

formulas.name: TRUNC
formulas.description: Truncates a number to an integer by removing the decimal part.
formulas.action: args => { const d=Number(args[1])||0; const f=Math.pow(10,d); return Math.trunc(Number(args[0])*f)/f; }

formulas.name: SIGN
formulas.description: Returns the sign of a number: 1, -1, or 0.

formulas.name: LOG
formulas.description: Returns the logarithm of a number to a specified base.

formulas.name: LOG10
formulas.description: Returns the base-10 logarithm of a number.

formulas.name: LN
formulas.description: Returns the natural logarithm of a number.

formulas.name: EXP
formulas.description: Returns e raised to the power of a given number.

formulas.name: FACT
formulas.description: Returns the factorial of a number.
formulas.action: args => { let n=Math.abs(Math.floor(Number(args[0]))); if(n>170) return Infinity; let r=1; for(let i=2;i<=n;i++) r*=i; return r; }

formulas.name: COMBIN
formulas.description: Returns the number of combinations for a given number of items.
formulas.action: args => { let n=Math.floor(Number(args[0])),k=Math.floor(Number(args[1])); if(k>n) return 0; let r=1; for(let i=0;i<k;i++) r=r*(n-i)/(i+1); return Math.round(r); }

formulas.name: GCD
formulas.description: Returns the greatest common divisor.
formulas.action: args => { let a=Math.abs(Math.floor(Number(args[0]))),b=Math.abs(Math.floor(Number(args[1]))); while(b){let t=b;b=a%b;a=t;} return a; }

formulas.name: LCM
formulas.description: Returns the least common multiple.
formulas.action: args => { let a=Math.abs(Math.floor(Number(args[0]))),b=Math.abs(Math.floor(Number(args[1]))); let aa=a,bb=b; while(bb){let t=bb;bb=aa%bb;aa=t;} return a*b/aa; }

formulas.name: RAND
formulas.description: Returns a random number between 0 and 1.

formulas.name: RANDBETWEEN
formulas.description: Returns a random integer between bottom and top.

formulas.name: PI
formulas.description: Returns the value of PI.

formulas.name: SIN
formulas.description: Returns the sine of an angle in radians.

formulas.name: COS
formulas.description: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

formulas.name: TAN
formulas.description: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.

formulas.name: ASIN
formulas.description: Returns the arcsine of a number (in radians).

formulas.name: ACOS
formulas.description: Returns the arccosine of a number (in radians).

formulas.name: ATAN
formulas.description: Returns the arctangent of a number.

formulas.name: ATAN2
formulas.description: Returns the arctangent from x and y coordinates.

formulas.name: DEGREES
formulas.description: Converts radians to degrees.

formulas.name: RADIANS
formulas.description: Converts degrees to radians.

formulas.name: SUMPRODUCT
formulas.description: Returns the sum of the products of corresponding ranges or arrays.
formulas.action: args => { const half=Math.floor(args.length/2); let s=0; for(let i=0;i<half;i++) s+=Number(args[i])*Number(args[i+half]); return s; }

formulas.name: IF
formulas.description: Returns one value if a condition is true, another if false.
formulas.action: args => { const test=args[0]; const t=String(test).trim(); if(t==='TRUE'||t==='true'||t==='1'||Number(t)!==0&&t!=='') return args[1]; return args[2]!==undefined?args[2]:''; }

formulas.name: AND
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if all arguments are true.

formulas.name: OR
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if any argument is true.

formulas.name: NOT
formulas.description: Reverses the logic of its argument.

formulas.name: IFERROR
formulas.description: Returns a value if no error; otherwise returns a specified value.

formulas.name: IFNA
formulas.description: Returns a value if the result is #N/A; otherwise returns the result.

formulas.name: IFS
formulas.description: Checks multiple conditions and returns a value corresponding to the first TRUE condition.
formulas.action: args => { for(let i=0;i<args.length-1;i+=2){ const t=String(args[i]).trim(); if(t==='TRUE'||t==='true'||Number(t)!==0&&t!=='') return args[i+1]; } return '#N/A'; }

formulas.name: SWITCH
formulas.description: Evaluates an expression against a list of values and returns a result for the first match.
formulas.action: args => { const expr=String(args[0]); for(let i=1;i<args.length-1;i+=2){ if(String(args[i])===expr) return args[i+1]; } return args.length%2===0?args[args.length-1]:'#N/A'; }

formulas.name: TRUE
formulas.description: Returns the logical value TRUE.

formulas.name: FALSE
formulas.description: Returns the logical value FALSE.

formulas.name: LEN
formulas.description: Returns the number of characters in a text string.

formulas.name: LEFT
formulas.description: Returns the leftmost characters from a text value.

formulas.name: RIGHT
formulas.description: Returns the rightmost characters from a text value.
formulas.action: args => { const s=String(args[0]); const n=Number(args[1])||1; return s.substring(s.length-n); }

formulas.name: MID
formulas.description: Returns a specific number of characters from a text string.

formulas.name: UPPER
formulas.description: Converts text to uppercase.

formulas.name: LOWER
formulas.description: Converts text to lowercase.

formulas.name: PROPER
formulas.description: Capitalizes the first letter in each word of a text value.

formulas.name: TRIM
formulas.description: Removes all spaces from text except for single spaces between words.

formulas.name: CLEAN
formulas.description: Removes all nonprintable characters from text.

formulas.name: CONCATENATE
formulas.description: Joins several text items into one text item.

formulas.name: CONCAT
formulas.description: Concatenates text from multiple ranges or strings.

formulas.name: TEXTJOIN
formulas.description: Combines text from multiple ranges with a delimiter.
formulas.action: args => { const delim=String(args[0]); const ignore=String(args[1]).toLowerCase()==='true'||args[1]==='1'; const parts=args.slice(2); return (ignore?parts.filter(v=>v!==''):parts).join(delim); }

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE
formulas.description: Substitutes new_text for old_text in a text string.
formulas.action: args => { let s=String(args[0]),old=String(args[1]),nw=String(args[2]); if(!args[3]) return s.split(old).join(nw); let n=Number(args[3]),c=0; return s.replace(new RegExp(old.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&'),'g'),m=>(++c===n?nw:m)); }

formulas.name: REPLACE
formulas.description: Replaces characters within text.

formulas.name: FIND
formulas.description: Finds one text value within another (case-sensitive).

formulas.name: SEARCH
formulas.description: Finds one text value within another (case-insensitive).

formulas.name: TEXT
formulas.description: Formats a number and converts it to text.
formulas.action: args => { const v=Number(args[0]); const fmt=String(args[1]); if(fmt.includes('%')) return (v*100).toFixed(fmt.replace(/[^0]/g,'').length-1)+'%'; const dp=(fmt.split('.')[1]||'').length; return v.toFixed(dp); }

formulas.name: VALUE
formulas.description: Converts a text argument to a number.

formulas.name: REPT
formulas.description: Repeats text a given number of times.

formulas.name: CHAR
formulas.description: Returns the character specified by a code number.

formulas.name: CODE
formulas.description: Returns a numeric code for the first character in a text string.

formulas.name: EXACT
formulas.description: Checks whether two text values are identical (case-sensitive).

formulas.name: NUMBERVALUE
formulas.description: Converts text to a number in a locale-independent manner.

formulas.name: TODAY
formulas.description: Returns today's date as a text string.
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }

formulas.name: NOW
formulas.description: Returns the current date and time.

formulas.name: YEAR
formulas.description: Returns the year portion of a date.
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); return isNaN(d)?'#VALUE!':d.getFullYear(); }

formulas.name: MONTH
formulas.description: Returns the month of a date (1–12).
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); return isNaN(d)?'#VALUE!':d.getMonth()+1; }

formulas.name: DAY
formulas.description: Returns the day of the month for a date (1–31).
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); return isNaN(d)?'#VALUE!':d.getDate(); }

formulas.name: HOUR
formulas.description: Returns the hour of a time value (0–23).

formulas.name: MINUTE
formulas.description: Returns the minute component of a time value.

formulas.name: SECOND
formulas.description: Returns the second component of a time value.

formulas.name: WEEKDAY
formulas.description: Returns the day of the week for a date (1=Sunday).
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); return isNaN(d)?'#VALUE!':d.getDay()+1; }

formulas.name: WEEKNUM
formulas.description: Returns the week number of a date in the year.
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); if(isNaN(d)) return '#VALUE!'; const start=new Date(d.getFullYear(),0,1); return Math.ceil(((d-start)/86400000+start.getDay()+1)/7); }

formulas.name: DATE
formulas.description: Returns the date corresponding to the given year, month, and day.

formulas.name: DATEVALUE
formulas.description: Converts a date text string to a serial number (days since 1900-01-01).
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); const base=new Date(1900,0,1); return isNaN(d)?'#VALUE!':Math.floor((d-base)/86400000)+1; }

formulas.name: DAYS
formulas.description: Returns the number of days between two dates.
formulas.action: args => { const e=new Date(args[0]),s=new Date(args[1]); return isNaN(e)||isNaN(s)?'#VALUE!':Math.round((e-s)/86400000); }

formulas.name: NETWORKDAYS
formulas.description: Returns the number of working days between two dates (excl. weekends).
formulas.action: args => { let s=new Date(args[0]),e=new Date(args[1]); if(isNaN(s)||isNaN(e)) return '#VALUE!'; let count=0; let d=new Date(s); while(d<=e){const w=d.getDay();if(w!==0&&w!==6)count++;d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} return count; }

formulas.name: EDATE
formulas.description: Returns the date that is a specified number of months before or after a date.
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); d.setMonth(d.getMonth()+Number(args[1])); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }

formulas.name: EOMONTH
formulas.description: Returns the last day of the month a specified number of months away.
formulas.action: args => { const d=new Date(args[0]); d.setMonth(d.getMonth()+Number(args[1])+1,0); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }

formulas.name: VLOOKUP
formulas.description: Looks for a value in the leftmost column and returns a value in the same row from a specified column. (Operates on named range data passed as args)

formulas.name: HLOOKUP
formulas.description: Looks for a value in the top row and returns a value in the same column from a specified row.

formulas.name: INDEX
formulas.description: Returns the value of an element in a table, selected by row and column index.

formulas.name: MATCH
formulas.description: Returns the relative position of an item in an array.
formulas.action: args => { const val=String(args[0]); const arr=args.slice(1,args.length-1); const i=arr.findIndex(v=>String(v)===val); return i===-1?'#N/A':i+1; }

formulas.name: CHOOSE
formulas.description: Chooses a value from a list of values based on an index number.

formulas.name: TRANSPOSE
formulas.description: Returns the transpose of an array. Passes through args as-is in this engine.

formulas.name: ISBLANK
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the value is empty.

formulas.name: ISNUMBER
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the value is a number.

formulas.name: ISTEXT
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the value is text.

formulas.name: ISERROR
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the value is any error.

formulas.name: ISNA
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the value is the #N/A error.

formulas.name: ISEVEN
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the number is even.

formulas.name: ISODD
formulas.description: Returns TRUE if the number is odd.

formulas.name: NA
formulas.description: Returns the error value #N/A.

formulas.name: TYPE
formulas.description: Returns a number indicating the data type of a value.
formulas.action: args => { const v=args[0]; if(v===''||v===null||v===undefined) return 1; if(!isNaN(Number(v))) return 1; if(typeof v==='boolean'||v==='TRUE'||v==='FALSE') return 4; if(String(v).startsWith('#')) return 16; return 2; }

formulas.name: STDEV
formulas.description: Estimates standard deviation based on a sample.
formulas.action: args => { const nums=args.map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)); const n=nums.length; if(n<2) return 0; const m=nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; return Math.sqrt(nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+Math.pow(b-m,2),0)/(n-1)); }

formulas.name: STDEVP
formulas.description: Calculates standard deviation based on the entire population.
formulas.action: args => { const nums=args.map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)); const n=nums.length; if(!n) return 0; const m=nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; return Math.sqrt(nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+Math.pow(b-m,2),0)/n); }

formulas.name: VAR
formulas.description: Estimates variance based on a sample.
formulas.action: args => { const nums=args.map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)); const n=nums.length; if(n<2) return 0; const m=nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; return nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+Math.pow(b-m,2),0)/(n-1); }

formulas.name: MEDIAN
formulas.description: Returns the median of the given numbers.
formulas.action: args => { const s=args.map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); const m=Math.floor(s.length/2); return s.length%2?s[m]:(s[m-1]+s[m])/2; }

formulas.name: MODE
formulas.description: Returns the most frequently occurring value in an array.
formulas.action: args => { const m={}; let best=null,bv=-1; args.forEach(v=>{const n=Number(v); if(!isNaN(n)){m[n]=(m[n]||0)+1; if(m[n]>bv){bv=m[n];best=n;}}}); return best===null?'#N/A':best; }

formulas.name: LARGE
formulas.description: Returns the k-th largest value in a data set.
formulas.action: args => { const k=Number(args[args.length-1]); const s=args.slice(0,args.length-1).map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>b-a); return s[k-1]!==undefined?s[k-1]:'#NUM!'; }

formulas.name: SMALL
formulas.description: Returns the k-th smallest value in a data set.
formulas.action: args => { const k=Number(args[args.length-1]); const s=args.slice(0,args.length-1).map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); return s[k-1]!==undefined?s[k-1]:'#NUM!'; }

formulas.name: RANK
formulas.description: Returns the rank of a number in a list (1 = largest by default).
formulas.action: args => { const n=Number(args[0]); const rest=args.slice(1,args.length-1).map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)); const order=Number(args[args.length-1])||0; const sorted=rest.slice().sort((a,b)=>order?a-b:b-a); return sorted.indexOf(n)+1; }

formulas.name: PERCENTILE
formulas.description: Returns the k-th percentile of values in a range.
formulas.action: args => { const k=Number(args[args.length-1]); const s=args.slice(0,args.length-1).map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); const idx=k*(s.length-1); const lo=Math.floor(idx); return s[lo]+(s[lo+1]!==undefined?(s[lo+1]-s[lo])*(idx-lo):0); }

formulas.name: CORREL
formulas.description: Returns the correlation coefficient between two data sets.
formulas.action: args => { const half=Math.floor(args.length/2); const x=args.slice(0,half).map(Number); const y=args.slice(half).map(Number); const n=x.length; const mx=x.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; const my=y.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; const num=x.reduce((s,xi,i)=>s+(xi-mx)*(y[i]-my),0); const dx=Math.sqrt(x.reduce((s,xi)=>s+Math.pow(xi-mx,2),0)); const dy=Math.sqrt(y.reduce((s,yi)=>s+Math.pow(yi-my,2),0)); return dx&&dy?num/(dx*dy):0; }

formulas.name: FORECAST
formulas.description: Calculates or predicts a future value by using existing values (linear regression).
formulas.action: args => { const x=Number(args[0]); const n=Math.floor((args.length-1)/2); const ys=args.slice(1,n+1).map(Number); const xs=args.slice(n+1).map(Number); const my=ys.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; const mx=xs.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n; const b=xs.reduce((s,xi,i)=>s+(xi-mx)*(ys[i]-my),0)/xs.reduce((s,xi)=>s+Math.pow(xi-mx,2),0); return my+b*(x-mx); }

formulas.name: SLOPE
formulas.description: Returns the slope of the linear regression line.
formulas.action: args => { const half=Math.floor(args.length/2); const ys=args.slice(0,half).map(Number); const xs=args.slice(half).map(Number); const my=ys.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/half; const mx=xs.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/half; return xs.reduce((s,xi,i)=>s+(xi-mx)*(ys[i]-my),0)/xs.reduce((s,xi)=>s+Math.pow(xi-mx,2),0); }

formulas.name: INTERCEPT
formulas.description: Returns the y-intercept of the linear regression line.
formulas.action: args => { const half=Math.floor(args.length/2); const ys=args.slice(0,half).map(Number); const xs=args.slice(half).map(Number); const my=ys.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/half; const mx=xs.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/half; const b=xs.reduce((s,xi,i)=>s+(xi-mx)*(ys[i]-my),0)/xs.reduce((s,xi)=>s+Math.pow(xi-mx,2),0); return my-b*mx; }

formulas.name: NORMDIST
formulas.description: Returns the normal distribution for the specified mean and standard deviation.
formulas.action: args => { const x=Number(args[0]),m=Number(args[1]),s=Number(args[2]),c=String(args[3]).toUpperCase()==='TRUE'; if(!c) return Math.exp(-0.5*Math.pow((x-m)/s,2))/(s*Math.sqrt(2*Math.PI)); const z=(x-m)/s; return 0.5*(1+Math.tanh(z/Math.sqrt(2)*0.8854)); }

formulas.name: NORMSDIST
formulas.description: Returns the standard normal cumulative distribution.

formulas.name: SUMSQ
formulas.description: Returns the sum of the squares of the arguments.

formulas.name: SUMIF
formulas.description: Sums the values in a range that meet a condition. (args: values..., criteria)
formulas.action: args => { const crit=String(args[args.length-1]); const vals=args.slice(0,args.length-1).map(Number); const n=Number(crit); return vals.filter(v=>v===n).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); }

formulas.name: COUNTIF
formulas.description: Counts the number of cells that meet a condition.
formulas.action: args => { const crit=String(args[args.length-1]); const vals=args.slice(0,args.length-1); return vals.filter(v=>String(v)===crit).length; }

formulas.name: AVERAGEIF
formulas.description: Returns the average of all cells that meet a given criteria.
formulas.action: args => { const crit=String(args[args.length-1]); const n=Number(crit); const nums=args.slice(0,args.length-1).map(Number).filter(v=>v===n); return nums.length?nums.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/nums.length:'#DIV/0!'; }

formulas.name: NPV
formulas.description: Returns the net present value of an investment based on a discount rate and cashflows.

formulas.name: FV
formulas.description: Returns the future value of an investment.

formulas.name: PV
formulas.description: Returns the present value of an investment.

formulas.name: PMT
formulas.description: Calculates the payment for a loan based on constant payments and a constant interest rate.

formulas.name: RATE
formulas.description: Returns the interest rate per period of an annuity (approximation).
formulas.action: args => { const n=Number(args[0]),p=Number(args[1]),pv=Number(args[2]); let r=0.1; for(let i=0;i<100;i++){const f=pv*Math.pow(1+r,n)+p*(Math.pow(1+r,n)-1)/r; const fp=n*pv*Math.pow(1+r,n-1)+p*(n*Math.pow(1+r,n-1)*r-(Math.pow(1+r,n)-1))/(r*r); r-=f/fp; if(Math.abs(f)<1e-6) break;} return r; }

formulas.name: IRR
formulas.description: Returns the internal rate of return for a series of cash flows.
formulas.action: args => { const cf=args.map(Number); let r=0.1; for(let i=0;i<100;i++){const npv=cf.reduce((s,v,t)=>s+v/Math.pow(1+r,t),0); const d=cf.reduce((s,v,t)=>s-t*v/Math.pow(1+r,t+1),0); const nr=r-npv/d; if(Math.abs(nr-r)<1e-6){r=nr;break;} r=nr;} return r; }

formulas.name: SLN
formulas.description: Returns the straight-line depreciation of an asset for one period.

formulas.name: EFFECT
formulas.description: Returns the effective annual interest rate given the nominal rate and periods per year.

formulas.name: NOMINAL
formulas.description: Returns the nominal annual interest rate given the effective rate and periods per year.

formulas.name: ARABIC
formulas.description: Converts a Roman numeral to Arabic.
formulas.action: args => { const map={M:1000,D:500,C:100,L:50,X:10,V:5,I:1}; let s=0,prev=0; String(args[0]).toUpperCase().split('').reverse().forEach(c=>{const v=map[c]||0; s+=v<prev?-v:v; prev=v;}); return s; }

formulas.name: ROMAN
formulas.description: Converts an Arabic numeral to Roman.
formulas.action: args => { let n=Math.floor(Number(args[0])); const vals=[1000,900,500,400,100,90,50,40,10,9,5,4,1]; const syms=['M','CM','D','CD','C','XC','L','XL','X','IX','V','IV','I']; let r=''; vals.forEach((v,i)=>{while(n>=v){r+=syms[i];n-=v;}}); return r; }

formulas.name: BASE
formulas.description: Converts a number into a text representation with a given radix.

formulas.name: DECIMAL
formulas.description: Converts a text representation of a number in a given base into decimal.

formulas.name: BIN2DEC
formulas.description: Converts a binary number to decimal.

formulas.name: DEC2BIN
formulas.description: Converts a decimal number to binary.

formulas.name: DEC2HEX
formulas.description: Converts a decimal number to hexadecimal.

formulas.name: HEX2DEC
formulas.description: Converts a hexadecimal number to decimal.

formulas.name: CONVERT
formulas.description: Converts a number from one measurement system to another.
formulas.action: args => { const v=Number(args[0]),f=String(args[1]).toLowerCase(),t=String(args[2]).toLowerCase(); const kg={kg:1,g:0.001,lb:0.453592,oz:0.0283495,ton:907.185}; const m={m:1,km:1000,cm:0.01,mm:0.001,mi:1609.34,ft:0.3048,'in':0.0254,yd:0.9144}; const lut=Object.assign({},kg,m); return lut[f]&&lut[t]?v*lut[f]/lut[t]:'#N/A'; }

formulas.name: UNIQUE
formulas.description: Returns unique values from a list.

formulas.name: SORT
formulas.description: Sorts the values in a range or array.

formulas.name: FILTER
formulas.description: Filters values where corresponding flag values are non-empty/true.
formulas.action: args => { const half=Math.floor(args.length/2); const vals=args.slice(0,half); const flags=args.slice(half); return vals.filter((_,i)=>flags[i]&&flags[i]!=='0'&&flags[i]!=='FALSE').join(', '); }

formulas.name: SEQUENCE
formulas.description: Generates a sequence of numbers.

formulas.name: FLATTEN
formulas.description: Returns all values flattened into a single list.
